title: Animals Hats
description: A mod about creating cute hats in Minecraft!
body:
# ANIMALS HATS Animals Hats is a mod about making cute animal hats and some mobs... from your favorite cube game! We have fabrics, cotton and a wide variety of different colors so you can create hats of all kinds.

![BunnyHats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e94b8fe95370c43950259239dbfd99b5ebc249b3.png) ![AnimalsHats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3a891eb498f5491e9df1a36ab7b690468f499a9.png) ![Racoons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27ddfbf14e1a71d4c62becbc09c77543e4bdbe14.png)
